subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Almighty, the Best-Beloved. Fix your gaze
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الابصر. شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب فلتنظرن من یظهره الله یوم القیمة بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
